headline: As GEV Garners Attention Consider These 3 Renewable Energy Stocks Under $30
summary: Shares of GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) have rerated higher as AI data center power demand reignites investor appetite for the picks-and-shovels of the energy transition. That gravity is now pulling smaller renewable names along for the ride, and several still trade under $30, putting exposure within reach of retail investors who missed Vernova’s run. With that ... headline: We Continue To Need Power, Power And More Power: And That's Still Bullish For GE Vernova
